title: Master Sword PVP
description: A series of texture packs both public and private made for Minecraft pvp and optimizing every aspect of minecraft for the optimal experience.
body:
Custom texture pack for both PVP and vanilla Minecraft. Whether you're exploring, building, or battling, this pack improves visibility and style without overwhelming the classic gameplay.

## Vanilla and PvP Features
**Custom name-dependent textures:** Sword (Master Sword, Withered Hyperion) Works on both diamond and netherite swords

**Custom enchant-dependent mace:**
- Breach (Blue)
- Density (Red)
  
**Self-made animated textures:**
- Netherite ingot animated
- Animated redstone materials

**Already made textures:**
- Blocks
- Sky
- Animated Hyperion texture

Step into a vibrant and immersive world with my Master Sword, a texture pack designed to elevate your Minecraft experience without losing the game’s iconic charm.
